word: H3707 - כַּעַס - kaʻaç - kaw-as' - Be angry

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּעס

Transliteration: ka‛as

Phonetic: kaw-as'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be angry, be vexed, be indignant, be wroth, be grieved, provoke to anger and wrath
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be vexed, be indignant
      2. to be angry
    2. (Piel) to provoke to anger
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to vex
      2. to vex, provoke to anger

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1016

Part(s) of speech: Verb
